title: Support  - App
scenario: Verify that navigating to Menu > Support > App displays support details including App Version, User ID, App ID, Last Connected, and a "Go" button, with Tenant Name and ID shown if logged in with a tenant account.
steps: Pair and connect a headset to the device.
Observe the new screen that appears with support details.
expected: A new screen appears displaying the following support details: App Version, Tenant Name (if logged in with tenant account), Tenant ID (if logged in with tenant account), User ID, App ID, Last Connected, and a "Go" button. The user should be able to take a screenshot or write down these details for a faster support process.
